zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Holand III於大約1278年出生在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭時，他的父親Sir Robert de Holand II34歲，母親Elizabeth de Salmesbury24歲。他於大約1308年與Maud la Zouche在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1328年10月在英國奧可福爾亨利--坦斯享年51歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Holand III于大约1278年出生在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Holand II34岁，母亲Elizabeth de Salmesbury24岁。他于大约1308年与Maud la Zouche在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1328年10月在英国奧可福爾亨利--坦斯享年51岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Holand III was born about 1278, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Robert de Holand II, was 34 and his mother, Elizabeth de Salmesbury, was 24. He married Maud la Zouche about 1308, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in October 1328, in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Preston, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Holand III est né environ 1278, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Holand II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Salmesbury, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Maud la Zouche environ 1308, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en octobre 1328, à Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Holand III um 1278 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Holand II 34 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Salmesbury 24. Er hat um 1308 in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Maud la Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Oktober 1328 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Preston, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Holand III è nato il circa 1278 nel Up Holland, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Holand II, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Salmesbury, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Maud la Zouche circa 1308, nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1328, nel Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Preston, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Holand IIIが約1278年にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Holand IIは34歳，母Elizabeth de Salmesburyは24歳であった。約1308年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターでMaud la Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1328年10月にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘンリー-オン-サムスで51歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアプレストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Holand III(이)가 대략 1278년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Holand II(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Salmesbury(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 Maud la Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1328년 10월 영국 스퍼드실르 헨리--섬스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 플레스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Holand III nasceu aproximadamente 1278, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Holand II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Salmesbury, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud la Zouche aproximadamente 1308, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1328, em Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Holand III родился около 1278 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Holand II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Salmesbury, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud la Zouche около 1308 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер октябрь 1328 г. в местности хенли-он-тамесь, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Holand III nació aproximadamente 1278, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Holand II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Salmesbury, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Maud la Zouche aproximadamente 1308, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1328, en Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
